name: HeyGen
tagline: AI video platform with instant video translation and custom avatars
description: HeyGen has rapidly grown into one of the most popular AI avatar video tools, especially known for its breakthrough Video Translation feature that can dub a video into another language while matching the speaker's lip movements. It's also excellent for creating personalized sales videos, social media content, and custom AI avatars from a selfie.
cons: Avatar lip sync not always perfect
bestFor: Sales teams needing personalized and multilingual video
keyStrength: Video translation and dubbing in 40+ languages
